title: tricerma octogonum
intro: Tricerma octogonum, also known as Eight-Angle Grass or Octopus Plant, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tricerma octogonum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting digestive and respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine to treat various ailments.
